<script>
/* ============================================================
   REVEAL ON SCROLL
   ============================================================ */
const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
  entries.forEach(e=>{ if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('in'); io.unobserve(e.target); } });
},{threshold:0.18});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal, .reveal-scale').forEach(el=>io.observe(el));

/* ============================================================
   BOOK A SESSION — CALENDLY-STYLE PICKER, LANDS ON WHATSAPP
   ============================================================ */
(function(){
  const confirmBtn = document.getElementById('bookingConfirmBtn');
  if(!confirmBtn) return;
  const WA_NUMBER = '917498367952';
  let chosenSession = null, chosenDuration = null;

  function updateLink(){
    if(chosenSession && chosenDuration){
      const msg = `Hi Sweta, I'd like to book a ${chosenSession} (${chosenDuration}). Could you share your availability?`;
      confirmBtn.href = `https://wa.me/${WA_NUMBER}?text=${encodeURIComponent(msg)}`;
      confirmBtn.classList.remove('is-disabled');
    } else {
      confirmBtn.classList.add('is-disabled');
    }
  }
  updateLink();

  document.querySelectorAll('#sessionTypeOptions .booking-option').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
      document.querySelectorAll('#sessionTypeOptions .booking-option').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('selected'));
      btn.classList.add('selected');
      chosenSession = btn.dataset.session;
      updateLink();
    });
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('#sessionDurationOptions .booking-option').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
      document.querySelectorAll('#sessionDurationOptions .booking-option').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('selected'));
      btn.classList.add('selected');
      chosenDuration = btn.dataset.duration;
      updateLink();
    });
  });
})();

/* ============================================================
   JOURNEY TIMELINE — TAP/KEYBOARD TOGGLE (mobile has no :hover)
   ============================================================ */
document.querySelectorAll('.stem-item').forEach(item=>{
  function toggle(){
    const isOpen = item.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';
    item.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(!isOpen));
  }
  item.addEventListener('click', toggle);
  item.addEventListener('keydown', (e)=>{
    if(e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' '){ e.preventDefault(); toggle(); }
  });
});

/* ============================================================
   NAV SCROLL STATE
   ============================================================ */
const nav = document.getElementById('siteNav');
window.addEventListener('scroll', ()=>{
  nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 40);
},{passive:true});

/* ============================================================
   PETAL GEOMETRY HELPER
   petal path centered at origin, pointing up, then rotated
   ============================================================ */
function petalPath(len, width){
  return `M0,0 C${-width},${-len*0.35} ${-width*0.6},${-len*0.85} 0,${-len} C${width*0.6},${-len*0.85} ${width},${-len*0.35} 0,0 Z`;
}
function lotusPetalPath(len, width){
  return `M0,0 C${-width*1.05},${-len*0.18} ${-width*0.95},${-len*0.55} ${-width*0.38},${-len*0.82} C${-width*0.18},${-len*0.94} ${width*0.18},${-len*0.94} ${width*0.38},${-len*0.82} C${width*0.95},${-len*0.55} ${width*1.05},${-len*0.18} 0,0 Z`;
}
function polarLabel(radius, angleDeg){
  const a = (angleDeg-90) * Math.PI/180;
  return { x: radius*Math.cos(a), y: radius*Math.sin(a) };
}

/* ---------- INTRO PORTRAIT — decorative mandala ring ---------- */
(function(){
  const svg = document.getElementById('introMandalaBg');
  if(!svg) return;
  const ns = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';
  const colors = ['var(--rose)','var(--gold)'];

  // three concentric circles
  [148,120,95].forEach((r,i)=>{
    const c = document.createElementNS(ns,'circle');
    c.setAttribute('cx','0'); c.setAttribute('cy','0'); c.setAttribute('r',r);
    c.setAttribute('fill','none'); c.setAttribute('stroke', colors[i%2]);
    c.setAttribute('stroke-width','0.6'); c.setAttribute('opacity','0.28');
    svg.appendChild(c);
  });

  // outer tick marks
  const tickCount = 32;
  for(let i=0;i<tickCount;i++){
    const angle = (360/tickCount)*i * Math.PI/180;
    const x1 = 140*Math.cos(angle), y1 = 140*Math.sin(angle);
    const x2 = 150*Math.cos(angle), y2 = 150*Math.sin(angle);
    const line = document.createElementNS(ns,'line');
    line.setAttribute('x1',x1.toFixed(1)); line.setAttribute('y1',y1.toFixed(1));
    line.setAttribute('x2',x2.toFixed(1)); line.setAttribute('y2',y2.toFixed(1));
    line.setAttribute('stroke', colors[i%2]); line.setAttribute('stroke-width','1');
    line.setAttribute('opacity','0.35');
    svg.appendChild(line);
  }

  // middle ring of small petal diamonds
  const petalCount = 16;
  for(let i=0;i<petalCount;i++){
    const angle = (360/petalCount)*i;
    const g = document.createElementNS(ns,'g');
    g.setAttribute('transform', `rotate(${angle}) translate(0,-107)`);
    const p = document.createElementNS(ns,'path');
    p.setAttribute('d','M0,-8 L6,0 L0,8 L-6,0 Z');
    p.setAttribute('fill','none'); p.setAttribute('stroke', colors[i%2]);
    p.setAttribute('stroke-width','0.8'); p.setAttribute('opacity','0.32');
    g.appendChild(p);
    svg.appendChild(g);
  }
})();

/* ---------- HERO LOTUS — layered realistic bloom, opens in stages ---------- */
(function(){
  const svg = document.querySelector('#heroLotus svg');

  function addRing(count, len, width, rotOffset, cls, delayStart, delayStep){
    for(let i=0;i<count;i++){
      const angle = (360/count)*i + rotOffset + (Math.random()*4-2);
      const jitterScale = 0.95 + Math.random()*0.1;
      const g = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','g');
      g.setAttribute('transform', `rotate(${angle.toFixed(2)}) scale(${jitterScale.toFixed(3)})`);
      g.setAttribute('filter','url(#petalShadow)');
      const p = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','path');
      p.setAttribute('d', lotusPetalPath(len,width));
      p.setAttribute('class', cls);
      p.style.animationDelay = (delayStart + i*delayStep)+'s';
      g.appendChild(p);
      svg.appendChild(g);
    }
  }

  // outer ring opens first — the widest reach
  addRing(8, 158, 50, 0, 'hero-petal-outer', 0.1, 0.15);
  // middle ring, offset so petals nestle between the outer ones
  addRing(8, 112, 40, 22.5, 'hero-petal-mid', 1.5, 0.13);
  // inner ring — deepest colour, opens last, closest to the heart
  addRing(6, 64, 27, 15, 'hero-petal-inner', 2.9, 0.12);

  // golden stamens fanning from the centre
  const stamenGroup = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','g');
  stamenGroup.style.opacity = '0';
  stamenGroup.style.animation = 'fillIn 1s ease forwards';
  stamenGroup.style.animationDelay = '4.4s';
  const stamenCount = 16;
  for(let i=0;i<stamenCount;i++){
    const angle = (360/stamenCount)*i;
    const pos = polarLabel(20, angle);
    const line = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','line');
    line.setAttribute('x1','0'); line.setAttribute('y1','0');
    line.setAttribute('x2', pos.x.toFixed(2)); line.setAttribute('y2', pos.y.toFixed(2));
    line.setAttribute('stroke','url(#lotusStamenGrad)'); line.setAttribute('stroke-width','1.1'); line.setAttribute('stroke-linecap','round');
    stamenGroup.appendChild(line);
    const dot = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle');
    dot.setAttribute('cx', pos.x.toFixed(2)); dot.setAttribute('cy', pos.y.toFixed(2)); dot.setAttribute('r','1.3');
    dot.setAttribute('fill','#FFE8A8');
    stamenGroup.appendChild(dot);
  }
  svg.appendChild(stamenGroup);

  const seedPod = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle');
  seedPod.setAttribute('r','13'); seedPod.setAttribute('fill','url(#lotusStamenGrad)'); seedPod.setAttribute('opacity','0');
  seedPod.style.animation = 'fillIn 1s ease forwards';
  seedPod.style.animationDelay = '4.6s';
  svg.appendChild(seedPod);
})();

/* ---------- PHILOSOPHY LOTUS (interactive, 7 petals) ---------- */
const philData = [
  {label:'Healing', title:'Healing', text:"The starting petal. Every path here begins with permission — to feel what hurts, and to trust that it can soften."},
  {label:'Self Love', title:'Self Love', text:"Not indulgence, but respect — learning to speak to yourself the way you'd speak to someone you cherish."},
  {label:'Mindfulness', title:'Mindfulness', text:"Returning to the present moment, again and again, until it becomes less of an effort and more of a home."},
  {label:'Energy', title:'Energy Work', text:"Attending to what can't always be named — the subtle shifts that ripple through body and mood alike."},
  {label:'Meditation', title:'Meditation', text:"Stillness as daily practice. A few quiet minutes that slowly reshape the other twenty-three hours."},
  {label:'Mandala', title:'Mandala Art', text:"Pattern and repetition as a form of prayer — each circle drawn slowly, with nowhere else to be."},
  {label:'Breathwork', title:'Breathwork', text:"The breath as an anchor and a teacher — proof that the nervous system can be gently, patiently retrained."},
];
(function(){
  const svg = document.querySelector('#philLotus svg');
  const count = philData.length;
  const len = 128, width = 30;

  // soft echo ring behind the clickable petals — fuller, more "in bloom" silhouette
  // (rotation lives on a wrapping <g> so the CSS transform on the path,
  // used for the bloom-in/hover animation, doesn't overwrite the rotation)
  philData.forEach((d,i)=>{
    const angle = (360/count)*i + (360/count)/2;
    const g = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','g');
    g.setAttribute('transform', `rotate(${angle})`);
    const bg = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','path');
    bg.setAttribute('d', lotusPetalPath(len*0.72, width*1.35));
    bg.setAttribute('class','phil-petal-bg');
    bg.style.transitionDelay = (i*0.05)+'s';
    g.appendChild(bg);
    svg.appendChild(g);
  });

  philData.forEach((d,i)=>{
    const angle = (360/count)*i;
    const g = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','g');
    g.setAttribute('transform', `rotate(${angle})`);
    const p = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','path');
    p.setAttribute('d', lotusPetalPath(len,width));
    p.setAttribute('class','phil-petal');
    p.style.transitionDelay = (0.15 + i*0.07)+'s';
    p.addEventListener('mouseenter', ()=>selectPetal(i));
    p.addEventListener('click', ()=>selectPetal(i));
    g.appendChild(p);
    svg.appendChild(g);

    const pos = polarLabel(len+20, angle);
    const t = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','text');
    t.setAttribute('x',pos.x); t.setAttribute('y',pos.y);
    t.setAttribute('class','phil-label');
    t.style.transitionDelay = (0.4 + i*0.07)+'s';
    t.textContent = d.label;
    svg.appendChild(t);
  });
  const c = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle');
  c.setAttribute('r','27'); c.setAttribute('class','phil-center');
  svg.appendChild(c);
  const ct = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','text');
  ct.setAttribute('x','0'); ct.setAttribute('y','5');
  ct.setAttribute('class','phil-label phil-center-label');
  ct.textContent = 'Sweta';
  svg.appendChild(ct);

  const petals = svg.querySelectorAll('.phil-petal');
  function selectPetal(i){
    petals.forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
    petals[i].classList.add('active');
    const info = document.getElementById('philInfo');
    info.style.opacity = 0;
    setTimeout(()=>{
      document.getElementById('philTitle').textContent = philData[i].title;
      document.getElementById('philText').textContent = philData[i].text;
      info.style.opacity = 1;
    },180);
  }
  window.selectPetalInit = selectPetal;
})();

/* ---------- MODALITIES MANDALA (6 clickable ring segments) ---------- */
const modData = [
  {label:'Meditation', title:'Meditation', text:'Stillness as a daily practice — learning to sit with the mind until it quiets on its own.'},
  {label:'Reiki', title:'Reiki', text:'Gentle energy healing that helps release what the body has been holding onto for too long.'},
  {label:'Life Coaching', title:'Life Coaching', text:'Structured, compassionate conversations that turn confusion into a clear next step.'},
  {label:'Mandala Art', title:'Mandala Art', text:'Circular, repetitive drawing used as a moving meditation — no artistic skill required.'},
  {label:'Breathwork', title:'Breathwork', text:'Guided breathing practices that calm the nervous system in real time.'},
  {label:'Energy Healing', title:'Energy Healing', text:'A gentle, hands-on approach to easing emotional and physical tension.'},
];
(function(){
  const svg = document.querySelector('#mandalaWrap svg');
  const segCount = modData.length;
  const rInner = 44, rOuter = 150;
  const segAngle = 360/segCount;

  function arcPath(a0,a1,r0,r1){
    const toXY=(r,a)=>{ const rad=(a-90)*Math.PI/180; return [r*Math.cos(rad), r*Math.sin(rad)]; };
    const [x0,y0]=toXY(r1,a0), [x1,y1]=toXY(r1,a1);
    const [x2,y2]=toXY(r0,a1), [x3,y3]=toXY(r0,a0);
    const large = (a1-a0)>180?1:0;
    return `M${x0},${y0} A${r1},${r1} 0 ${large} 1 ${x1},${y1} L${x2},${y2} A${r0},${r0} 0 ${large} 0 ${x3},${y3} Z`;
  }

  const segs=[];
  modData.forEach((d,i)=>{
    const a0 = i*segAngle, a1=(i+1)*segAngle - 2.5;
    const path = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','path');
    path.setAttribute('d', arcPath(a0,a1,rInner,rOuter));
    path.setAttribute('class','ring-seg');
    path.addEventListener('mouseenter', ()=>selectSeg(i));
    path.addEventListener('click', ()=>selectSeg(i));
    svg.appendChild(path);
    segs.push(path);

    const mid = (a0+a1)/2;
    const pos = polarLabel((rInner+rOuter)/2, mid);
    const t = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','text');
    t.setAttribute('x',pos.x); t.setAttribute('y',pos.y);
    t.setAttribute('class','ring-seg-label');
    t.textContent = d.label;
    svg.appendChild(t);
  });

  const c = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle');
  c.setAttribute('r', rInner-4); c.setAttribute('class','mandala-center-circle');
  svg.appendChild(c);
  const ct = document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','text');
  ct.setAttribute('x','0'); ct.setAttribute('y','5');
  ct.setAttribute('class','mandala-center-label');
  ct.textContent = 'Sweta';
  svg.appendChild(ct);

  function selectSeg(i){
    segs.forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));
    segs[i].classList.add('active');
    const panel = document.getElementById('modalityPanel');
    panel.style.opacity = 0;
    setTimeout(()=>{
      document.getElementById('modTitle').textContent = modData[i].title;
      document.getElementById('modText').textContent = modData[i].text;
      panel.style.opacity = 1;
    },180);
  }
})();

/* ============================================================
   FLOATING BUTTERFLIES (occasional, ambient)
   ============================================================ */
function spawnButterfly(){
  const layer = document.getElementById('butterflyLayer');
  const b = document.createElement('div');
  b.className = 'butterfly fly';
  b.style.top = (10 + Math.random()*60) + 'vh';
  const grad = Math.random() > 0.5 ? 'wingGoldGrad' : 'wingRoseGrad';
  b.innerHTML = `<svg viewBox="0 0 60 40" fill="none">
    <g class="wing" filter="url(#wingGlow)">
      <path d="M30 20 C24 10 12 3 5 7 C-1 11 2 20 12 22 C19 23.5 26 22.5 30 20Z" fill="url(#${grad})" opacity="0.92"/>
      <path d="M30 20 C25 24 15 29 10 33 C6 36 9 37.5 16 34 C22 31 28 25 30 20Z" fill="url(#${grad})" opacity="0.8"/>
      <path d="M9 12 L22 18M7 16 L20 20M13 24 L22 22M11 29 L19 27" stroke="#6B2F49" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.45"/>
    </g>
    <g class="wing" filter="url(#wingGlow)">
      <path d="M30 20 C36 10 48 3 55 7 C61 11 58 20 48 22 C41 23.5 34 22.5 30 20Z" fill="url(#${grad})" opacity="0.92"/>
      <path d="M30 20 C35 24 45 29 50 33 C54 36 51 37.5 44 34 C38 31 32 25 30 20Z" fill="url(#${grad})" opacity="0.8"/>
      <path d="M51 12 L38 18M53 16 L40 20M47 24 L38 22M49 29 L41 27" stroke="#6B2F49" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.45"/>
    </g>
    <circle cx="14" cy="14" r="0.9" fill="#FBEFD9" opacity="0.9"/>
    <circle cx="46" cy="14" r="0.9" fill="#FBEFD9" opacity="0.9"/>
    <circle cx="20" cy="27" r="0.6" fill="#FBEFD9" opacity="0.7"/>
    <circle cx="40" cy="27" r="0.6" fill="#FBEFD9" opacity="0.7"/>
    <path d="M30 12C30 12 28.5 20 30 26C31.5 20 30 12 30 12Z" fill="#3D2130"/>
    <path d="M30 13 C28 9 25 8 23 9M30 13 C32 9 35 8 37 9" stroke="#3D2130" stroke-width="0.6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </svg>`;
  layer.appendChild(b);
  setTimeout(()=>b.remove(), 9500);
}
setTimeout(spawnButterfly, 3500);
setInterval(spawnButterfly, 14000);

/* ============================================================
   AMBIENT DUST IN BOOKS SECTION
   ============================================================ */
(function(){
  const layer = document.getElementById('dustLayer');
  for(let i=0;i<24;i++){
    const d = document.createElement('div');
    d.className='dust';
    d.style.left = Math.random()*100+'%';
    d.style.bottom = '-10px';
    d.style.animationDuration = (10+Math.random()*10)+'s';
    d.style.animationDelay = (Math.random()*10)+'s';
    layer.appendChild(d);
  }
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
